qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.singer_id = song.singer_id
WHERE song.title = 'Mysterious Girl' AND singer.name = 'Susanne Klatten' AND singer.citizenship = 'Germany' AND song.highest_position <= 1.0 AND song.sales >= 261000.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which singer entities with name equal to 'Susanne Klatten' and citizenship equal to 'Germany', having at least one related song record (linked on singer.singer_id = song.singer_id) with title equal to 'Mysterious Girl' and highest position at most '1.0' and sales at least '261000.0'?

qa_pairs.question: Which singers named Gina Rinehart, born in 1953 or earlier, have the song titled All This Time that sold exactly 292000 copies and reached a highest position of at most 1?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT singer.singer_id FROM singer
JOIN song ON singer.singer_id = song.singer_id
WHERE singer.name = 'Gina Rinehart' AND song.title = 'All This Time' AND singer.birth_year <= 1953.0 AND song.sales = 292000.0 AND song.highest_position <= 1.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which singer entities with name equal to 'Gina Rinehart' and birth year at most '1953.0', having at least one related song record (linked on singer.singer_id = song.singer_id) with title equal to 'All This Time' and sales equal to '292000.0' and highest position at most '1.0'?
